case_title: HAYWARD III MABEN MD VS. YULIA SARKISOV

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF HAYWARD III MABEN. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT YULIA SARKISOV. PLAINTIFF INDICATED AT THE OCT 1 HEARING THAT A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOVEMBER HEARING MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MABEN MD, HAYWARD III AS TO DEFENDANT SARKISOV, YULIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MABEN MD, HAYWARD III
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-29-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARKISOV, YULIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-05-2018 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HAYWARD MABEN III, MD. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF INDICATED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NOVEMBER HEARING MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
